title: Garlicky Crispy Dutch Egg Yolk Frittata
description: A bold and flavorful one-pan Dutch frittata that highlights rich egg yolks and a garlicky crust, perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: Preheat a 10-inch Dutch oven over medium heat and add 1 tsp olive oil, swirling to coat the bottom.
Whisk 6 eggs, 3 yolks, heavy cream, salt, pepper, and cayenne into a bowl until fully blended.
Pour the egg mixture into the hot Dutch oven and stir gently for 1 minute so the edges begin to set.
Sprinkle minced garlic over the surface and fold in the grated Gouda cheese until melted.
Reduce heat to low, cover the Dutch oven, and cook for 8 minutes until the top is firm but the center remains slightly runny.
Increase heat to high, then quickly sprinkle 1 tbsp butter on top and let it melt over the frittata for 30 seconds to form a crispy golden crust.
Remove the Dutch oven from the stove, stir in fresh parsley, and slice the frittata into wedges.
Serve hot, garnishing with a pinch of extra cheese if desired.
